hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'frontend/src/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"frontend/src/ was modified: before committing, run cd frontend && npm run build and stage the frontend/dist/ changes. The site deploys from committed dist — skipping the build ships stale JS/CSS."}}' || true
